description: NVIDIA Jetson Linux Driver Package contains a vulnerability in the Cboot blob_decompress function, where insufficient validation of untrusted data may allow a local attacker to cause a memory buffer overflow, which may lead to code execution, limited loss of Integrity, and limited denial of service.

product.name: Jetson AGX Xavier series, Jetson Xavier NX, Jetson TX2 NX, Jetson TX2 series
